title: Perimenopause Symptom Tracker
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Hot flashes, mood swings, brain fog, sleep that breaks at 3 a.m. - perimenopause is real, and you deserve a doctor who takes it seriously. This 121-page symptom tracker hands you the data to make that happen.

Who it's for:
- Women in their late 30s, 40s, and early 50s navigating perimenopause
- Patients preparing for OB/GYN, GP, or HRT specialist visits
- Anyone tracking the impact of hormone therapy, supplements, or lifestyle changes
- Daughters and partners supporting someone through midlife transition

What's inside:
- Daily symptom log: hot flashes, sleep, mood, energy, brain fog (1-10 scale)
- Cycle tracker - because cycles get weird before they end
- HRT, supplement, and medication log with dose and side-effect notes
- Weight, BP, and exercise tracking
- Monthly review pages: "what got better, what got worse, what's new"
- Doctor visit prep pages: questions to ask, symptoms to flag
- Resource section: 35+ named symptoms most women never knew were perimenopause

You're not crazy. You're not broken. You're not alone. You're in a hormonal transition that medicine has spent decades dismissing - and you're about to walk into your next appointment with receipts.

Order today and turn confusion into clarity.
